extraction_reasoning: The litigation table separates matters filed by and against the relevant parties. I excluded all “By” rows; among the “Against” rows, the Company has Nil criminal proceedings, 3 tax proceedings, Nil statutory/regulatory proceedings, and the subsidiaries have Nil in all listed categories, while promoter, director and KMP/SMP rows are also Nil. The litigation table reports ₹255.46 million against the Company, which converts to ₹25.546 crore at ₹10 million per crore; this is the quantified aggregate against the Company and subsidiaries, including the tax proceedings. Contingent-liability items are stated in ₹ million as of March 31, 2026, but the provided text contains no explicit stated Total row, so the contingent-liabilities total is not extracted; the listed items are ₹120.96 million for the TAMP matter, ₹252.03 million income tax and ₹3.43 million GST. The revenue concentration disclosed is company-wide revenue from operations for full Fiscal 2026, but it concerns cruise ticket sales rather than top-five or top-ten customers, so both customer-concentration fields are null. The source currency unit for the litigation and contingent-liability tables is million, and the litigation amount conversion is ₹255.46 million ÷ 10 = ₹25.546 crore.
